_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Loss of appetite and unintentional weight loss
Chronic exhaustion, which may cause depression

clinical_thresholds.note: Sr. Cortisol level lower than normal

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment

claim.label: ACTH stimulation test, Contrast-Enhanced CT Abdomen report
Post treatment Blood sugar test report
Post treatment Sr. Cortisol level report

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Sr. Cortisol level lower than normal?

common_queries: Sr. Cortisol level not documented as lower than normal in pre-authorization documents.
Sr. Electrolyte or Sr. Cortisol report missing from pre-authorization documents.
Clinical notes missing or incomplete, or lacking evaluation findings, indications, or planned treatment.
ACTH stimulation test report or Contrast-Enhanced CT Abdomen report missing from claim submission documents.
Post-treatment Sr. Cortisol level report missing from claim submission documents.
Detailed Indoor case papers missing or incomplete, or lacking vitals or treatment details at claim submission.

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MD / DNB/Equivalent (in General medicine, Pediatric Medicine)
clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Addison's disease only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation.
